workout_name: Alpine Loop Fatigue Resistance Sweet Spot
reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, as shown by the 25W drop in sustained efforts. This session addresses these issues directly by incorporating extended sweet spot work, vital for the Alpine Loop climb. Given the extended rest period since the last ride, the workout begins controlled to adjust intensity gradually.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 10 min intervals at 201-218W with 5 min recovery at 209-223W between each. Focus on maintaining form and controlled breathing.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
